items.name: Health Potion
items.description: Restores 25 HP. Use from the hotbar.

items.name: Slime Goo
items.description: Sticky residue from a vanquished slime.

items.name: Rope
items.description: A coil of sturdy hemp rope.

items.name: Plank
items.description: A length of weathered timber.

items.name: Coconut Wood
items.description: Fibrous wood hewn from a palm trunk.

items.name: Coconut
items.description: A hairy husk sloshing with sweet water.

items.name: Fish
items.description: Fresh from the sea.

items.name: Cooked Fish
items.description: Flaky and salt-crusted, straight from the coals.

items.name: Crab Cake
items.description: Sweet crab bound with toasted coconut — a castaway's feast.

items.name: Gold Coin
items.description: A doubloon bearing a weathered crest.

items.name: Compass
items.description: Points true north, mostly.

items.name: Tricorn Hat
items.description: Battered three-cornered hat. Makes you look the part.

items.name: Sailor's Coat
items.description: Salt-stained wool. Warmer than it looks.

items.name: Leather Boots
items.description: Sturdy boots with good tread for wet decks.

items.name: Cutlass
items.description: A curved sword, well-balanced for close quarters.

items.name: Sword
items.description: A plain iron sword. Equip, then press Q to swing.

items.name: Shortbow
items.description: A simple shortbow. Equip, then left-click to fire arrows.

items.name: Arrow
items.description: Ammunition for a bow.

items.name: Pickaxe
items.description: A sturdy pickaxe. Equip, then press Q to mine.

items.name: Axe
items.description: A felling axe. Equip, then press Q to chop trees.

items.name: Fishing Rod
items.description: A bamboo rod and line. Equip, then press Q at a fishing spot.

items.name: Hopeite Ore
items.description: Raw chunks of hopeite-bearing rock.

items.name: Hopeite Ingot
items.description: A smelted bar of hopeite. Ready for the anvil.

items.name: Hopeite Sword
items.description: Sharper than a plain iron blade. Forged at the anvil.

items.name: Hopeite Pickaxe
items.description: A hefty pickaxe tipped with hopeite.

items.name: Hopeite Axe
items.description: A felling axe with a keen hopeite edge.

items.name: Smithing Hammer
items.description: A cross-peen hammer. Equip to work the anvil more cleanly — each successful hit fills the crafting bar faster.

items.name: Captain's Signet
items.description: Bronze ring bearing an unfamiliar crest. Feels lucky.

items.name: River Fish
items.description: A freshwater fish, common in rivers and streams.

items.name: Frog
items.description: A plump river frog. The legs are said to be a delicacy.

items.name: Eel
items.description: A long, slippery eel. Lives in rivers and deeper waters.

items.name: Worm Bait
items.description: A wriggling worm fished up by mistake. Still good bait.

items.name: Shell
items.description: An empty shell. Some collectors pay for fine specimens.

items.name: Fishbones
items.description: A picked-clean skeleton. Useful in some crafts.

items.name: Message in a Bottle
items.description: A sealed bottle containing... something. Better open it.

items.name: Sardine
items.description: A small, silvery schooling fish from shallow coasts.

items.name: Flatfish
items.description: A bottom-dwelling flatfish. Camouflaged against the sand.

items.name: Beach Crab
items.description: A small crab scuttling along tide pools.

items.name: Prawn
items.description: A shallow-water prawn. Prized for its sweet meat.

items.name: Crab
items.description: A hefty crab. Mind the claws.

items.name: Tropical Fish
items.description: A bright reef fish from warm shallows.

items.name: Octopus
items.description: An eight-armed cephalopod. Impressively clever.

items.name: Grey Pearl
items.description: A modest pearl fished from a shoreline oyster.

items.name: Starfish
items.description: A five-armed sea star. Slowly regrows lost limbs.

items.name: Ocean Fish
items.description: A deep-blue fish from open ocean waters.

items.name: Tuna
items.description: A powerful migratory fish. Worth its weight at market.

items.name: Broadfish
items.description: A broad-bodied ocean fish. Meaty and filling.

items.name: Deep Sea Fish
items.description: An eerie fish from the deep. Its eyes glow faintly.

items.name: Jellyfish
items.description: A translucent drifter. Don't touch it barehanded.

items.name: Shark Tooth
items.description: A razor-sharp tooth. A trophy — and a weapon component.

items.name: Black Pearl
items.description: A rare black pearl. Fetches a high price.

items.name: Large Bone
items.description: A weathered bone dredged from the deep.
